results.title: Kipps AI: Empowering Businesses with Whatsapp, Voice and Chat ...
results.content:
Multichannel Support: Works across website chat widgets, WhatsApp, voice calls and CRM integrations — helping teams answer questions and qualify leads automatically.

Smart Integrations: Integrates with CRM tools, telephony systems, Slack, WhatsApp, Zoom, Shopify, etc., so interactions update your systems automatically.

Business Growth Focus: Great for small teams and growing companies that want to lose fewer leads and save support hours while boosting customer satisfaction.

#### vs Alternatives

Before choosing Kipps AI, I looked at platforms like:

Retell AI (focuses mostly on voice only)

Other generic chatbot builders — but many lacked deep multichannel automation without heavy development. [...] Kipps stood out because it combines voice + chat + messaging agents in one platform with real integrations

Madalina B

#### What's great

Kipps AI is an excellent all‑in‑one platform for building WhatsApp, voice, and chat agents without any technical hassle. It captures leads, qualifies prospects, supports customers, and automates workflows effortlessly. Perfect for small teams that want to save time and scale faster with always‑on AI. Highly recommended.

Mode AI
Nishit Chittora

#### Alternatives Considered

Vapi [...] Kipps AI

results.title: Kipps.AI - AI Agents for Sales, Support and Operations
results.content:
their customers. 🏗️ What We're Building Kipps.ai is an all-in-one AI assistant that integrates seamlessly into existing workflows. We provide a suite of AI agents, including chatbots, voice agents, WhatsApp agents, and Instagram agents, all designed to handle key business functions around the clock. Our agents excel at lead qualification, lead nurturing, and customer support. By identifying user intent, our agents can qualify leads, nurture them through the sales funnel, and provide instant support. This frees up your human teams to handle more complex tasks. Kipps agents don't rely on immediate human intervention. When an issue requires it, we escalate concerns to the right channel with the user's contact information and intent, ensuring a smooth handoff. Kipps.AI also focuses on [...] ## Similar Companies

Our mission is to help companies efficiently handle these critical functions, allowing them to focus more on growth and less on repetitive tasks. 😇 Our Customers Inspire Us Whether you're a startup or a large enterprise, business leaders are some of the most passionate and hardworking individuals you'll meet. They wear multiple hats, juggling numerous responsibilities. Our goal is to alleviate some of this burden by streamlining marketing, automating sales, and enhancing customer support with AI.
